body: Footer text on dark background is below WCAG AA contrast. Adjust the color token. Acceptance: contrast ratio >= 4.5:1, documented.
title: Dark footer color fails contrast check

body: Add a 'Download CSV' export of the items list. Acceptance: a test verifies the CSV matches listItems() output.
title: Export report as CSV

body: Signup accepts malformed emails. Add validation rejecting invalid emails with a clear error. Acceptance: unit tests cover valid and invalid cases.
title: Validate email format on signup

body: The dashboard is slow for large accounts. Profile and reduce load time. Acceptance: a test or benchmark demonstrates the improvement.
title: Users report slow load on the dashboard

body: The listItems() function in src/items.js returns all 42 items at once. Add limit/offset pagination with sane defaults (page size 20, max 100) and document it. Acceptance: a unit test proves limit/offset slice correctly.
title: Add pagination to the items list endpoint
